_meta.description: Runtime metadata injected by bin/load-profile.sh after a profile is resolved. NOT present on profile files at rest — writing this field into a stored profile is meaningless because the loader overwrites it. Skill-layer callers read _meta to detect shadowing without scraping stderr.

source_path.description: Filesystem path of the resolved profile.

shadowed_starter.description: Path to a starter profile that this user/team profile shadowed (omit when nothing was shadowed).

shadowed_team.description: Paths to team profiles shadowed by this user profile.

schemaVersion.description: Profile schema version. Incremented on breaking changes.

stale_after_days.description: Age threshold (in days) for `bin/check-stale-branches.sh`. Local branches whose last commit is older than this AND that are not merged into a base branch are flagged as `stale_unmerged`. Doctor folds the result into its drift display. Default 90.

ci.description: Optional CI workflow generation settings. Controls GitHub Actions workflow output.

github.description: GitHub branch / tag / repo-security settings. Used by `bin/gh-integration.sh` for both --apply (write protection) and --check (audit protection drift via the doctor probe).

require_pr_reviews.description: Number of approving PR reviews required to merge into a strategy-declared branch. 0 disables the review-required rule entirely (single-developer flow).

items.description: Status-check context name as it appears in GitHub's Branch protection screen. Matrix-job names include the matrix vector (e.g. 'lint + bats (ubuntu-latest)').

require_status_checks.description: Status checks that MUST pass before merging into a strategy-declared branch. Empty array means no required checks.

require_code_owner_reviews.description: When true, branch protection requires a review from a CODEOWNERS-listed reviewer. Only meaningful when a CODEOWNERS file exists; gh-integration.sh --check warns when this is true but no CODEOWNERS file ships in the repo, and warns when CODEOWNERS exists but the gate is off.

tag_protection_pattern.description: fnmatch-style tag pattern that should be protected against deletion + force-push (e.g. 'v*'). Audited via the GitHub Rulesets API; setting this enables the tag_protection section of `gh-integration.sh --check`. Absent = audit skipped.

require_signed_commits.description: When true, branch protection requires GPG/SSH-signed commits on strategy-declared branches. The audit also reads the local `commit.gpgsign` git config (warn when remote requires signing but local config is unset).

require_signed_tags.description: When true, the audit asserts the local `tag.gpgsign` config is on. There is no GitHub-side rule for required signed tags; this is purely a local-config audit so release.sh's `git tag` commands produce signed tags.

allow_squash_merge.description: When true, audit asserts the repo allows squash-merge from the PR merge button. Mirrors the GitHub repo setting `allow_squash_merge`.

allow_rebase_merge.description: When true, audit asserts the repo allows rebase-merge from the PR merge button. Mirrors `allow_rebase_merge`.

allow_merge_commit.description: When true, audit asserts the repo allows merge-commits from the PR merge button. Mirrors `allow_merge_commit`. Most projects want exactly one of squash / rebase / merge-commit enabled.

delete_branch_on_merge.description: When true, audit asserts the repo auto-deletes head branches after merge. Mirrors `delete_branch_on_merge`. Recommended for hygiene; pairs with the local cleanup-branches skill.

auto_merge_strategy.description: Merge strategy `bin/pr.sh --auto-merge` uses when calling `gh pr merge --auto`. Default `squash` when unset. The repo must allow the chosen strategy via .github.allow_*_merge for auto-merge to succeed; the audit catches that mismatch in the repo_settings section.

governance.description: Optional CI governance gate configuration. Controls doctor-ci.sh behavior when run as a PR check.

enabled.description: When true, gen-ci --governance generates the governance-check workflow. Default true when the block is present.

threshold.description: Minimum health score (0-100) to pass the CI gate. Default 70.

severity.description: block = fail the check when score < threshold; warn = annotate but pass; off = skip entirely. Default 'block'.

ignore.description: Health-score categories to exclude from the CI gate score. Useful for suppressing noisy checks (e.g. orphans, stale) in early adoption.

release.description: Optional release-skill configuration. When absent, release skill defaults to conventional-changelog against CHANGELOG.md.

changelog_path.description: Relative path (from repo root) where CHANGELOG entries are appended. Must not start with '-' (option injection) or contain '..' (path traversal).

tag_prefix.description: Prefix for version tags (default: 'v'). Must not start with '-' (option injection) or contain shell metacharacters.

workspaces.description: Per-workspace config overrides for monorepos. Keys are relative paths (e.g. 'apps/web', 'packages/api') or '*' for all unmatched workspaces. Merged with detected workspace stacks by bin/resolve-workspace-configs.sh.

propertyNames.description: Either '*' for the catch-all override or a repo-relative path. Path constraint matches base_branches[]'s shape so workspace keys can't smuggle leading-dash or shell-metachar values into resolve-workspace-configs.sh.
